entry.title: 4-29-日记
entry.summary:
Dairy

2017-4-29 Saturday Sunny

Today and yesterday I‘ve done the same thing flying a kite. But things are not always happens smoothly.

The first day when I arrived in Olympic Park I found I forgot the central horizental skeleton of the skit.

And the next day I finally remered …
entry.content:
Dairy

2017-4-29 Saturday Sunny

Today and yesterday I‘ve done the same thing flying a kite. But things are not always happens smoothly.

The first day when I arrived in Olympic Park I found I forgot the central horizental skeleton of the skit.

And the next day I finally remered to bring it. Howere, unfortunately, I even wasn't flew it more than ten minutes before I broken it.

I'm a bad kite flyer, my kite fly up and drop down many times. So I was not suprised it would be broken.

But I still feel upset, because of the rare windy day. I'm afraid I can't fly a kite after the Labor Day.

entry.title: About Me
entry.summary:
日记编写规范

  • 第一行为Dairy做标题。
  • 第二行为日期星期天气情况。
  • 正文第一行可以是一天摘要，也可以直接写内容。

注意：日记内容须完全由英文组成
entry.content:

  • 第一行为Dairy做标题。
  • 第二行为日期星期天气情况。
  • 正文第一行可以是一天摘要，也可以直接写内容。

注意：日记内容须完全由英文组成
